w:r.w:t: Subject-wise Topic Lists for Pakistani University & Program Entry Tests
Computer/Engineering category. Subjects: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, English.
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
MDCAT — Medical & Dental College Admission Test
Subjects: Biology, Chemistry, Physics, English, Logical Reasoning.
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
NUST NET — National University of Sciences & Technology Entry Test
NET-ICS/Engineering category: Math, Physics, English, IQ. NET-BE/Medical category: Biology, Chemistry, English, IQ (subjects vary by chosen discipline).
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
Subjects: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, English, Analytical Reasoning.
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
Engineering category: Math, Physics, Chemistry, English. Medical category: Biology, Chemistry, Physics, English.
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
Categories: NAT-IE (Engineering), NAT-IM (Medical), NAT-IA/IBC/ICS/IGS (General/Business/Computing/Social Sciences). Subject combination depends on chosen category.
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
LCAT — Lahore College Admission / Aptitude Test
General aptitude-based test. Subjects: English, Quantitative Reasoning, Analytical Reasoning, General Knowledge.
Subjects: Verbal Ability, Quantitative Ability, Analytical/Logical Reasoning, Data Interpretation, General Knowledge.
NUMS Test — National University of Medical Sciences
Subjects: Biology, Chemistry, Physics, English, Logical Reasoning.
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
GIKI Test — Ghulam Ishaq Khan Institute
PIEAS Test — Pakistan Institute of Engineering & Applied Sciences
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
Subjects: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry/Computer Science, English, Analytical Reasoning.
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
UHS MDCAT — University of Health Sciences (Punjab)
Subjects: Biology, Chemistry, Physics, English, Logical Reasoning.
Periodic Classification of Elements and Periodicity
SAT (General): Reading, Writing & Language, Math. SAT II (Subject Tests): Math Level 2, Physics, Chemistry, Biology — choose relevant subject tests.
Literature/Vocabulary (Supplementary, common to all English-based sections)
